name: briefing_locator_panel_blit_dirty_rect
description: HudUiBriefingLocatorPanel::BlitDirtyRect blits the locator panel clip rect when a blit source is present.
known_limits: No VC byte target currently covers 0x403c90, so Binary-safe remains false.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly and decompilation for 0x403c90 validate the null bltSource early return and zVid_Image::BlitToActiveTarget(bltSource, clipRect.left, clipRect.top, 0, &clipRect) call.

The native smoke invokes the locator panel vtable DrawBase/BlitDirtyRect slot from a constructed briefing runtime, verifies no blit when bltSource is null, and verifies image, x, y, flags, and source rect arguments when bltSource is present.
